title: [MTR4] JR East E233 series | JR東日本E233系
description: JR East E233 series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The E233 series is a narrow-gauge commuter and suburban train operating on the JR East network in the Kanto region. Developed from the E231 and E531 series trains, the E233 series entered service in 2006 on the Chuo Line, with additional variants built for other lines thereafter. The train was the first in JR East to incorporate full-colour LED external displays as the Chuo Line has many service types, as colour-coding is used to differentiate between them.

This resource pack adds the E233 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with custom model and textures.

The variants included in this pack are as follows:
- E233-0
- E233-1000
- E233-3000
- E233-5000
- E233-6000
- E233-7000
- E233-8000

There are four types of cars for each variant and you may configure them as you wish.
- Cab forwards
- Trailer
- Pantograph trailer
- Cab backwards
